title: Outer Wilds Gravity Tech
description: Adds items such as gravity crystals and gravity floors from the game Outer Wilds. Requires Gravity API mod.
body:
Adds a few items from the game Outer Wilds like gravity crystals and the gravity floors.

By using amethyst shards and ghast tears you can craft gravity shards, which can be used to craft gravity crystals and gravity floor tiles. Gravity crystals create a small area around it where gravity is based on the direction it is placed in. Gravity tiles can be walked on from all angles. The mod also adds a new small structure (Nomai Ruins) and a new decorative block (Unpowered Gravity Tiles).

THIS MOD REQUIRES THE GRAVITY API MOD: [Download it here](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravity-api/version/0.7.18+fabric)
